name: the largest, most ornate of the shelters
identity: A significant shelter within the camp, associated with the elder and later used by the shaman. It is a place of spiritual importance and ritual activity.
current_status: The shaman is seen entering and exiting the shelter, performing symbolic gestures and offering quiet words to the women of the camp, while the elder is observed in the vicinity.

appearance.value: ornate, with intricate carvings and a central structure that stands out from the other shelters

purpose.value: a place of spiritual significance and ritual activity

volatile_state.current_activity: shaman performing symbolic gestures and offering words to the women, with the elder present
